name: recoil_state_confirm_quit_scalar_deleting_destructor
description: RecoilStateConfirmQuit::ScalarDeletingDestructor runs the confirm-quit state destructor, conditionally frees this when bit 0 of flags is set, and returns this.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_state_confirm_quit_destructors VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x415860 validates the destructor call, flags bit-0 delete branch, returned self pointer, and thiscall callee cleanup for the flags argument.
The native smoke verifies the non-deleting scalar path returns this and leaves the base vtable restored.
The native smoke verifies the deleting heap path returns the original this pointer.
